strengths: Long, varied engineering tenure across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Track record of building and sustaining own platform (GISCollective) plus public talks and workshops
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product leadership or recognized AI expertise expected at Principal level
Career history is senior IC at small/mid companies; lacks director-level influence or advising strategic customers
Cloud depth is limited (some AWS CDK) with no evidence of shaping cloud product strategy

key_factors.factor: AI strategy and recognized AI expertise
Director-level IC scope and external influence
Breadth of engineering experience and craftsmanship

response.justification: The role demands a Principal/Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, cloud product strategy fluency, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers. The résumé shows a strong hands-on senior developer with ~15 years across diverse stacks and one open-source platform, but AI exposure is limited to recent MCP/agent tooling work at re:cinq without shipped AI products, publications, or platform-level AI leadership. Cloud experience is present (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) but tactical, not strategic. There is no evidence of advising executives or shaping multi-team technical direction at the scale this role requires.
